prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 8462→10996→13151→12898→10271，整体呈先降后升的 V 形走势；2022–2023 年连续后移，2024 年小幅回升，2025 年大幅前移至约 10271 名，较 2024 年提升约 2600 名，显示报考热度明显回升；2021–2024 年物理类计划稳定在 275–292 人之间，2025 年计划 275 人；2026 年计划 288 人，较 2025 年扩招约 4.7%，扩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜 2021–2023 年稳定第 23 名，2024 年降至第 25 名，2025–2026 年进一步降至第 27 名，排名小幅下滑但仍属全国顶尖梯队；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，原校长张尧学因涉嫌严重违纪违法被查，可能对学校形象产生一定影响；抖音热度排名第 85、评价"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中低水平；2024 年有中关注度断档信号，2025 年有低关注度断档信号，但 2025 年实际位次大幅前移说明报考热度已恢复；冶金工程 A+、护理学 A+、材料科学与工程 A、临床医学 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、交通运输工程 A-、机械工程 A-、控制科学与工程 A-、土木工程 A-、化学工程与技术 A-、基础医学 A-、管理科学与工程 A-、马克思主义理论 A-，共 13 个 A- 及以上学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与中南大学优势学科高度契合；河北省 2026 年高考总人数约 60.98 万，较 2025 年总人数约 60.68 万小幅增加约 3000 人，物理类考生按历史占比估算约 36.5 万人，竞争略有加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 459 分、特殊类型线 499 分，近年呈小幅上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移的回升趋势、2026 年计划扩招约 4.7% 的缓解作用、考生总数小幅增加带来的竞争压力、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般的综合影响；预测最低位次约 10612 名，区间 10112–11112 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 10112–11112 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如 10000 名以内）可重点冲刺临床医学（八年制）和计算机类王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（如 11000 名左右）应以三档专业保底为主，避免滑档风险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 8462→10996→13151→12898→10271, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; it continuously moved back in 2022–2023, slightly recovered in 2024, and significantly moved forward to about 10271 in 2025, an improvement of about 2600 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear rebound in application popularity; from 2021 to 2024, the Physics Category plan was stable between 275–292 people, with a plan of 275 people in 2025; the 2026 plan is 288 people, an expansion of about 4.7% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was stable at 23rd from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 25th in 2024, and further dropped to 27th in 2025–2026, a slight decline but still among the top tier nationally; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, as former president Zhang Yaoxue is under investigation for serious violations of discipline and law, which may have some impact on the school's image; Douyin popularity ranks 85th with a rating of 'average', indicating mid-to-low short video exposure; there was a medium attention gap signal in 2024 and a low attention gap signal in 2025, but the actual ranking in 2025 significantly moved forward, indicating that application popularity has recovered; Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 13 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligned with Central South University's advantageous disciplines; in 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Hebei Province is about 609,800, a slight increase of about 3,000 from about 606,800 in 2025; Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 365,000 based on historical proportion, indicating slightly intensified competition; in 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 459 points, and the special type line was 499 points, showing a slight upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery trend of a significant ranking advance in 2025, the easing effect of a planned enrollment expansion of about 4.7% in 2026, the competitive pressure from a slight increase in total candidates, the somewhat negative school reputation, and average Douyin popularity; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10,612, with a range of 10,112–11,112.

- Clinical Medicine Category (Clinical and Stomatology Five-Year Program).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10,112–11,112, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 10,000), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program) and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 11,000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of falling off the list.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次约 1102→1087→1699→1543→1789，整体呈波动后移趋势；2021–2022 年稳定在 1100 名左右，2023 年大幅后移至约 1699 名，2024 年小幅回升至 1543 名，2025 年再次后移至约 1789 名，近 3 年累计后移约 700 名；2021–2024 年历史类计划稳定在 30 人，2025 年扩至 40 人；2026 年计划 36 人，较 2025 年缩招 10%，缩招使竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流综合类大学；软科主榜 2021–2023 年稳定第 23 名，2024 年降至第 25 名，2025–2026 年进一步降至第 27 名，排名小幅下滑但仍属全国顶尖梯队；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，原校长被查事件可能影响学校形象；抖音热度排名第 85、评价"一般"，曝光量处于中低水平；历史类招生专业仅 4 个（法学、中国语言文学类、金融学类、外国语言文学类），专业选择面较窄；马克思主义理论 A- 与历史类部分专业相关，但中南大学优势学科主要集中在理工医领域，文史类学科评估等级相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度推荐（偏热），汉语言/中文专业推荐（偏热），外语类专业一般观望；河北省 2026 年历史类考生按历史占比约 40.2% 估算约 24.5 万人，较 2025 年历史类 24.37 万人小幅增加，竞争略有加剧；省控线 2025 年历史类本科批 477 分、特殊类型线 527 分，近年呈上升趋势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近 3 年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划缩招 10% 的加剧作用、考生总数小幅增加及学校声誉偏负面等因素；预测最低位次约 1652 名，区间 1417–1887 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1102→1087→1699→1543→1789, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; it stabilized around 1100 in 2021–2022, significantly dropped to about 1699 in 2023, slightly recovered to 1543 in 2024, and further dropped to about 1789 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 700 positions over the past 3 years; the enrollment plan for History Category was stable at 30 students from 2021 to 2024, expanded to 40 in 2025, and is planned at 36 in 2026, a 10% reduction compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was stable at 23rd from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 25th in 2024, and further dropped to 27th in 2025–2026, a slight decline but still among the top national tier; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with the former president being investigated potentially affecting the school's image; Douyin popularity ranking is 85th with a 'fair' rating, indicating medium-low exposure; only 4 majors are offered for History Category (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Finance, Foreign Languages and Literature), offering a narrow range of choices; Marxist Theory is rated A- and related to some History Category majors, but Central South University's strengths are mainly in science, engineering, and medicine, with relatively limited evaluation levels in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (relatively hot), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended (relatively hot), foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see; in 2026, Hebei Province's History Category candidates, estimated at about 40.2% of the total, are approximately 245,000, a slight increase from 243,700 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category in 2025 was 477 for undergraduate batch and 527 for special type line, showing an upward trend in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in rankings over the past 3 years, the intensifying effect of a 10% enrollment reduction in 2026, a slight increase in total candidates, and a somewhat negative school reputation; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1652, with a range of 1417–1887.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Law (Outstanding Talent Cultivation Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature, Digital Publishing)
- Finance (Economics and Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (including English, French, Japanese, Spanish).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1417–1887, with only 4 majors in History Category and clear tier divisions, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 as a stretch, and use Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (e.g., within 1400), you can focus on aiming for Law and the Outstanding Talent Cultivation Pilot Class; if your ranking is near the lower limit (e.g., above 1800), you should use Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety.
